overflow-number: The value must be less than or equal to {{max, number}}.
underflow-number: The value must be greater than or equal to {{min, number}}.
overflow-date: The date must be on or before {{max, datetime}}.
underflow-date: The date must be on or after {{min, datetime}}.
length: The value length must be between {{min, number}} and {{max, number}} characters.
invalid-enum-value: The value must be one of: {{possibleValues}}.
missing-host: The URL must include a valid host.
contains-path: The URL must not contain a path.
contains-query: The URL must not contain query parameters.
contains-fragment: The URL must not contain a fragment.
nil-id: The ID cannot be empty or nil.
missing-mx-records: The email domain does not have valid MX records.
not-digit: The value must contain only digits.
not-base64-url-encoded: The value must be base64 URL encoded.
